record.field: Create a new Advanced Sparring session Add a class session for Kids Karate tomorrow Schedule a new Fundamentals class for 6pm Create an extra session for Adult BJJ on Friday
Cancel today's Advanced Sparring Cancel the 6pm Fundamentals class Call off the Kids Karate session Cancel this morning's class Take the Adult BJJ session off the schedule
Create a new class template (e.g., Fundamentals, Advanced Sparring)
Create a class template called Fundamentals for the Kids Program Add a new Sparring class to Adult BJJ Create the Advanced Forms class template
List my project tasks and instructor todos
Show my tasks What tasks do I have? What's on my to-do list? Show overdue tasks What tasks are due this week? Show my instructor todos What do I need to follow up on?
Create a new project task or instructor todo

Create a task: follow up with John's parents Add a to-do: call Mike about missed classes, due Friday Create high priority task: prepare belt test roster for Saturday Make a task to review Sarah's attendance this week Add reminder to send tournament info to parents
Mark task "follow up with John" as done Complete the task about Mike's attendance I finished the belt test roster task Mark done: call parents about tournament Check off the task about Sarah
Update a task's deadline, priority, or add a note

Move the belt test task deadline to next Friday Update task "call parents" with a note: left voicemail Change the deadline on the roster task to Saturday Add a note to the John follow-up task: meeting confirmed
What's on my calendar today? What's on my calendar this week? Show calendar events for tomorrow Do I have any meetings this week? What events are scheduled for next week? Show my schedule for today

Create a calendar event tomorrow at 3pm: instructor meeting Add a meeting on Friday at 2pm: parent conference Schedule an event next Monday at 10am called belt test prep Put a staff meeting on the calendar for Thursday 4pm Create event: tournament sign-up deadline on April 20th
Cancel and remove a calendar event
Cancel the instructor meeting on Friday Remove the belt test prep event Delete the Thursday 4pm staff meeting Cancel the event called parent conference
